effect_group.name: apply lower buff if higher buff duration is low
heal Food from $foodAmountAdd that was added by an item
stat is at max but stuffed, convert normally
stat is at max, convert more slowly
heal Water from $waterAmountAdd that was added by an item
stat is at max but stuffed, convert normally
stat is at max, convert more slowly

buff.name: CookieRush
buff.description_key: Cookie Rush gives you a boost to your carry capacity.

buff.name: CookieRush2
buff.description_key: Cookie Rush gives you a boost to your carry capacity.

buff.name: buffRamen
buff.description_key: Increases Well Insulated by 2. Increases Dead Eye by 2.

buff.name: buffCabbageRolls
buff.description_key: Increased Carry Capacity, Lucky Looter, and Daring Adventurer

buff.name: buffTheBeef
buff.description_key: Increases Player Exp Gain by 10% and more.

buff.name: buffLuigi
buff.description_key: Increases Lucky Looter by 1. Increases Harvest Count by 95%. Increases Advanced Engineering by 1.

buff.name: buffDrunky
buff.description_key: Whoah there buddy. Getting a little over confident there? +50% Entity Damage with melee, -20% Attack Speed, +20% Run speed, +1 STR, -Attack Stamina.

buff.name: Yin-Yang
buff.description_key: Cures stomache ailments 69% of the time.

buff.name: Mariachi
buff.description_key: I have the energy and annoyance of a Mariachi Band. I have a boost to Fortitude and Stamina Regen.

buff.name: Heat Wave
buff.description_key: Increased Carry Capacity, Lucky Looter, and Daring Adventurer

buff.name: Caffeinated
buff.description_key: Increases your resistance to the cold.Increased Carry Capacity, Lucky Looter, and Daring Adventurer

buff.name: Traveling BBQ
buff.description_key: BBQ Elk Jerky has a kick and increased your Agility. Jerky also gives Carry Capacity, Lucky Looter, and Daring Adventurer

buff.name: Spicy Burn
buff.description_key: I've eaten something very spicy and it burns really bad.

triggered_effect.message: Not a smart idea to eat that. It was really HOT!!!!
Why do I keep eating these things, they are killing me!!!!
I will never eat THAT again...

buff.name: Vitamin C
buff.description_key: Juice protects your body from mild conditions.

buff.name: Vitamin B
buff.description_key: Liquid Veg gives increased Stamina regeneration.

buff.name: Beetroot
buff.description_key: Beetroot gives increased Stamina regeneration and a heal over time.

buff.name: Sugar Rush
buff.description_key: Coolaid gives you a boost to your carry capacity.

buff.name: Strong Bones
buff.description_key: Milk can help heal your bones. If broken they will become splinted. If sprained you are healed.

buff.name: Riga Me This
buff.description_key: Increases Master Chef by 3. Increases Shocked resistance by 42%. Increases Mobility by 42%.

buff.name: Beefy
buff.description_key: Increases Burning Flaming Arrow resistance by 13%.

buff.name: Blue Tongue
buff.description_key: Increases Stamina Max Modifier OT by 1.

buff.name: Diner Food
buff.description_key: Increases Player Exp Gain by 5%. Increases Secret Stash by 2.

buff.name: Cheesy Za
buff.description_key: Increases Arm Sprained resistance by 20%. Increases Stamina Max by 23.

buff.name: Peppery Goodness
buff.description_key: Increases Leg Broken resistance by 17%. Increases Stamina Max Modifier OT by 2.

buff.name: Cool Soup
buff.description_key: Increases Well Insulated by 2. Increases Dead Eye by 2.

buff.name: Where's the guac?
buff.description_key: Increases Living Off The Land by 2. Increases Heavy Armor by 2.

buff.name: Country Boy
buff.description_key: Increases Intellect by 2. Increases Injury Bleeding resistance by 20%.

buff.name: Rotten Eggs
buff.description_key: Increases Run And Gun by 2. Increases Ill Infection0 resistance by 21%.

buff.name: 4 eggs, your way
buff.description_key: Increases Carry Capacity by 5. Increases Mobility by 29%.

buff.name: Deep South
buff.description_key: Increases Pain Tolerance by 2. Increases Run And Gun by 2.

buff.name: Cake boy
buff.description_key: Increases Pain Tolerance by 2. Increases Healing Factor by 2.

buff.name: Grandma's dead
buff.description_key: Increases Drowning1 resistance by 29%. Increases Injury Stunned1 resistance by 29%.

buff.name: Wheres the salsa?
buff.description_key: Increases Arm Broken resistance by 30%. Increases Heavy Metal by 2.

buff.name: Old Timers are all dead..
buff.description_key: Increases Better Barter by 2. Increases Burning Molotov resistance by 18%.

buff.name: Basil and more basil
buff.description_key: Increases Hammer Forge by 2. Increases Burning Environment resistance by 29%.

buff.name: Healthy Breakfast
buff.description_key: Increases Stamina Max Modifier OT by 1.

buff.name: Chimicurri?
buff.description_key: Increases From The Shadows by 2. Increases Living Off The Land by 2.

buff.name: Euro rice
buff.description_key: Increases Gunslinger by 2. Increases Flurry Of Blows by 2.

buff.name: Bunny Food
buff.description_key: Increases Health Max Modifier OT by 2.

buff.name: Smokey flavor
buff.description_key: Reduces Treasure Radius by 2. Increases Player Exp Gain by 4%.

buff.name: Salmon-y
buff.description_key: Increases Lucky Looter by 2. Increases Explosive Weapons by 2.

buff.name: A classic dish
buff.description_key: Increases Daring Adventurer by 2. Increases Shotgun Messiah by 2.

buff.name: Spicy Salmon
buff.description_key: Increases Heavy Metal by 1. Increases Pack Mule by 1.

buff.name: Burro
buff.description_key: Increases Burning Molotov resistance by 22%. Increases Automatic Weapons by 2.

buff.name: Suns out Guns out
buff.description_key: Increases Stamina Max by 22. Increases Health Max Modifier OT by 2.

buff.name: Triple Bathroom Wednesday
buff.description_key: Increases Headshot by 3. Increases Explosive Weapons by 3. Increases Reload Speed Multiplier by 28%.

buff.name: Veggie, eeeewwww
buff.description_key: Increases Leg Broken resistance by 30%. Increases Heavy Armor by 2.

buff.name: buffStuffed
buff.description_key: I couldn't eat another bite! -20% walk/run speed, -15% jump, +1 Fort, -1 AGI. HP Regen.

buff.name: buffRiseAndShine
buff.description_key: Well balanced breakfast! +40% walk/run speed, +1 Fort +1 Agi +Stam/HP regen.

buff.name: buffHealthy
buff.description_key: Eat Well live well! +40% walk/run speed, +1 Fort +1 Agi +Stam/HP regen.

buff.name: buffOneWithNature
buff.description_key: Hippy! But atleast nature loves you. +20% Block damage, +20% Combat Speed , +25% harvest amount bonus, -25% Damage Resistance. Cancels on combat.

buff.name: buffAllNatural
buff.description_key: +9 Carry, +10% Harvest Amount, +10% Block Damage, +10% Combat Speed, -10% Damage Resistance. Cancels on Combat

buff.name: buffSmartyPants
buff.description_key: Look how smart you are, nerd! +25% XP gain, +2 Craft Tier, +30% craft speed, -9 Carry Cap, -45% Damage Resistance.

buff.name: buffSmarty
buff.description_key: +10% Xp gain, +1 Craft Tier, +10% Craft Speed, -20% Damage Resistance.

buff.name: buffBeefcake
buff.description_key: Strong, but dumb as bricks. -30% walk/run speed, -2 Craft Tier, -40% Craft Time, +3 Strength, +Full Carry Cap, +500% Entity Damage/w melee and fists. +90% damage resistance, 0 Stamina Loss, +50% Combat Speed.

buff.name: buffPumpedUp
buff.description_key: Strong as an Ox! -10% walk/run speed, -5% Craft Time, +1 Strength, +Full Carry Cap, +20% Entity Damage/w melee and fists. +25% damage resistance, +10% Combat Speed.

buff.name: buffHotWings
buff.description_key: WOW THATS HOT! 200% Run Speed, +20 Health, +50% Stamina Cost, -Heat Resistance, +Cold Resistance.

buff.name: buffWaterPlease
buff.description_key: Still smoking! +40% Run speed, +10% Stamina cost, -Heat Resistance, +Cold Resistance.

buff.name: buffMartialArtist
buff.description_key: Awaken your inner martial artist. Jump high, strike fast and true!

buff.name: buffNightTime
buff.description_key: Perfect snack right before night! 20% EXP, Instant Craft, +2 Crafting Tier, Full carry Cap, 100% block damage with tools.
